entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
You made it. I expected you would. You have a
resilience I find... unusual.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
The ley network is still alive. It should not be
alive this late in a cycle. In eight hundred years, the network
has always failed before anyone reached this point. You are the
first.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
I cannot. Not out of loyalty to the Pallor — I
stopped caring about the Pallor's agenda centuries ago.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
But I was the first to understand it. And the first
to realize that understanding changes nothing. Every cycle,
someone reaches this point. Every cycle, they fail.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
I'm tired, you know. Eight hundred years. Every
cycle, the same — watching someone find the door, watching
someone open it, watching the world grey out and fold.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Every cycle, I think: this time they'll understand.
This time someone will find a way that doesn't end in sacrifice.
And every time, I watch them fail the same way I failed.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Enough scholarship. Let me show you what eight
centuries look like from the inside.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Your form is excellent, Edren. Cael taught you the
high guard, I assume. He was always precise.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Torren, you favour your left side when tired. The
spirits could have told you that.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Lira — how does it feel to defend a kingdom that
never deserved your loyalty?

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines: You are the first to draw blood in eight centuries.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
I was the first to understand the Pallor. I was
the first to name it. And I was the first to realize naming it
changes nothing.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
You will reach the Convergence. You will face what
I faced. And you will make the same choice I did.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Eight hundred years. Every cycle, the same. And
you... you actually changed something.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines:
Something changed in this cycle. And I do not fully
understand what.
